meaning: 1. to be unable to say or tell; 2. to not be worth mentioning
sentence: 这道菜说不上好吃，也说不上难吃。
pinyin: Zhè dào cài shuō bù shàng hǎochī, yě shuō bù shàng nánchī.
english: This dish can't really be called tasty, nor can it be called bad.

sentence: 这个展览的门票已经卖完了。
pinyin: Zhège zhǎnlǎn de ménpiào yǐjīng mài wán le.
english: Tickets for this exhibition are already sold out.

sentence: 我每天坐公交车去上班。
pinyin: Wǒ měitiān zuò gōngjiāochē qù shàngbān.
english: I take the bus to work every day.

sentence: 这栋建筑是在世纪末建成的。
pinyin: Zhè dòng jiànzhú shì zài shìjìmò jiànchéng de.
english: This building was completed at the end of the century.

meaning: 1. to enter and garrison; 2. (fig.) to establish a presence in
sentence: 新的咖啡品牌已进驻这栋楼。
pinyin: Xīn de kāfēi pǐnpái yǐ jìnzhù zhè dòng lóu.
english: A new coffee brand has established a presence in this building.
